div.p: Collect spawn requests during iteration, then spawn bullets via commands. Pattern: Structural Change Deferral for Borrow Checker Compliance.

ul.li: Borrow Checker: You cannot world.spawn() (requires &mut World) while iterating over world.query() (requires &World).
Performance: Batching insertions during the sync point improves cache locality and reduces allocation overhead.
Parallelism: Multiple systems can record to thread-local CommandBuffers simultaneously without contention.

g.text: push (x, y, speed) to local Vec

div.p: Deferred Spawning Pattern Immutable borrows of spawner_storage and position_storage prevent calling world.spawn() directly during iteration.
